test_cases.title: Search Functionality with Empty Query
steps: Open the web application in a browser
Click on the search bar
Do not enter any query and click the search button
test_cases.expected: The application should return all results or display a prompt to the user

test_cases.title: Search Functionality with Single Character
steps: Open the web application in a browser
Click on the search bar
Enter a single character and click the search button
test_cases.expected: The application should return relevant results

test_cases.title: Search Functionality with Special Characters
steps: Open the web application in a browser
Click on the search bar
Enter a query with special characters (<, >, &, '', ;, --) and click the search button
test_cases.expected: The application should return relevant results without breaking

test_cases.title: Login with Valid Credentials
steps: Open the web application in a browser
Click on the login button
Enter valid username and password
Click the login button
test_cases.expected: The application should log the user in successfully

test_cases.title: Login with Wrong Password
steps: Open the web application in a browser
Click on the login button
Enter valid username and incorrect password
Click the login button
test_cases.expected: The application should display an error message

test_cases.title: Form Validation with Empty Submission
steps: Open the web application in a browser
Click on a form
Do not enter any data and submit the form
test_cases.expected: The application should display error messages for required fields

test_cases.title: Form Validation with Boundary Values
steps: Open the web application in a browser
Click on a form
Enter boundary values (min/max length, numeric ranges) and submit the form
test_cases.expected: The application should validate the input correctly

test_cases.title: Responsive Design on Mobile
steps: Open the web application on a mobile device
Check the layout and functionality of the application
test_cases.expected: The application should render correctly and be functional on a mobile device

test_cases.title: Error Handling with Network Offline Simulation
steps: Open the web application in a browser
Simulate a network offline scenario
Perform an action that requires a network connection
test_cases.expected: The application should display an error message or handle the situation correctly

test_cases.title: Accessibility with Screen Reader
steps: Open the web application in a browser with a screen reader enabled
Navigate through the application using the screen reader
test_cases.expected: The application should be navigable and readable with a screen reader

test_cases.title: Security with XSS Probe
steps: Open the web application in a browser
Enter an XSS probe (<script>alert(1)</script>) in a text field
Submit the form
test_cases.expected: The application should prevent the XSS attack and not display the alert

test_cases.title: State Management with Page Refresh
steps: Open the web application in a browser
Perform an action that changes the application state
Refresh the page
test_cases.expected: The application should retain its state after the page refresh

test_cases.title: State Management with Multi-Tab Consistency
steps: Open the web application in multiple browser tabs
Perform an action that changes the application state in one tab
Check the state in the other tabs
test_cases.expected: The application should maintain consistency across multiple tabs
